description_long: This church features a prominent central dome painted blue, topped with a cross, and flanked by a smaller bell tower with a similar blue dome and cross. The building's exterior is primarily white with blue trim, and the roof is covered in terracotta tiles. The facade includes arched windows and doorways, with a covered portico supported by columns at the main entrance. The rear of the church has a semicircular apse and additional blue domed structures. The windows are tall and narrow, arranged symmetrically along the sides, and the overall design is characterized by smooth, rounded forms and minimal ornamentation. The church sits on a paved stone platform, suggesting a formal urban placement.
description: A white church with blue domes, terracotta roof tiles, and arched windows, featuring a central dome and a bell tower with crosses. The structure is accented with blue trim and sits on a stone platform.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main dome, bell tower, and the long nave with arched windows and blue trim.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance with a columned portico, central dome, and symmetrical facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bell tower, main dome, and the extended nave with arched windows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the semicircular apse, blue domed structures, and the back of the bell tower.
